title: Co-Dialectic Growth Telemetry — xOS-Hydratable Per-Turn Record
description: Schema for a single line in ~/.codialectic/growth.jsonl. Each line is self-describing (per SHARED-STATE HYDRATION INVARIANT) so a future xOS consumer can ingest the file without co-dialectic source code. Prompt content is NEVER stored — only its sha256 hash truncated to 16 chars.

schema_version.description: Pinned to this schema's version. Bump on breaking schema changes; old consumers can still parse older lines by version.

schema_url.description: Optional pointer to a hosted copy of the schema for runtime validation. Consumers can fetch this URL to validate without bundling the schema.

event_type.description: Discriminator for downstream aggregation. Most lines will be sharpening_turn.

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp. Always include the Z suffix.

session_id.description: 8-char hex session identifier. Aggregates within a single Co-Dialectic session; rotates across sessions.

persona.description: Active persona slug (e.g., architecture, product, design, debugging) at the time of the turn.

stakes_tier.description: EMERGENT SYSTEM IMMUNITY stakes tier detected for this prompt. T3+ triggers eager dialectic synthesis.

prompt_hash.description: sha256(prompt_text) — full 64-char hex. SHA-256 is cryptographically one-way; the prompt is NEVER recoverable from the hash. Privacy invariant.

prompt_length_chars.description: Length of the original prompt in characters (no content).

tiers.description: Per-tier scores, techniques, and cost. The user's choice is recorded in user_picked.

user_picked.description: Which tier the user chose. 'original' means user kept their prompt unchanged. 'edited' means user provided a custom edit.

tier_used_cost_usd.description: Actual cost of the path the user chose. For dialectic, this includes the synthesis round.

calibration_score.description: Cal: score on the response that followed the sharpening.

dismissed_micro_lessons.description: Technique slugs the user has muted in this session.

score.description: Estimated quality score for this tier's rewrite.

technique.description: The technique label applied at this tier. Used by teachme to look up the deep-dive file.

cost_usd.description: Estimated USD cost of generating this tier's rewrite. Dialectic synthesis is included only if the tier was actually generated (eager mode or user-picked).
